content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "請進來坐",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "歡迎光臨！請進來坐。",
          "pinyin": "Huānyíng guānglín! Qǐng jìnlái zuò.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Huan1ying2 guang1lin2! Qing3 jin4lai2 zuo4.",
          "translation_en": "Welcome! Please come in and have a seat.",
          "translation_ko": "어서 오세요! 들어와서 앉으세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "謝謝。請問有兩個人的座位嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie. Qǐngwèn yǒu liǎng gè rén de zuòwèi ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie. Qing3wen4 you3 liang3 ge4 ren2 de zuo4wei4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Thank you. Do you have a seat for two people?",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 두 명이 앉을 자리가 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "有，這邊請。我幫您帶過去。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu, zhèbiān qǐng. Wǒ bāng nín dài guòqù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3, zhe4bian1 qing3. Wo3 bang1 nin2 dai4 guo4qu4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, this way please. I'll take you over there.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 이쪽으로 오세요. 제가 안내해 드리겠습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好的，謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, xièxie.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, xie4xie.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 감사합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "不客氣。這是菜單，請慢慢看。",
          "pinyin": "Bú kèqì. Zhè shì càidān, qǐng mànman kàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu2 ke4qi4. Zhe4 shi4 cai4dan1, qing3 man4man kan4.",
          "translation_en": "You're welcome. Here's the menu, please take your time.",
          "translation_ko": "천만에요. 여기 메뉴판입니다. 천천히 보세요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the staff ask the customer to do first?",
          "question_ko": "직원이 손님에게 먼저 무엇을 하라고 했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Come in and sit down", "Look at the menu", "Order food", "Pay the bill"],
          "options_ko": ["들어와서 앉으세요", "메뉴를 보세요", "음식을 주문하세요", "계산하세요"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat after the staff: '歡迎光臨！請進來坐。'",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice inviting someone into your home or shop. Say: '請進來坐。'"
    },
    {
      "title": "出去買東西",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "媽媽",
          "text": "我要出去買菜，你要一起去嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ yào chūqù mǎi cài, nǐ yào yīqǐ qù ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 yao4 chu1qu4 mai3 cai4, ni3 yao4 yi1qi3 qu4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "I'm going out to buy groceries. Do you want to come along?",
          "translation_ko": "나 장 보러 나갈 건데, 같이 갈래?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "兒子",
          "text": "好啊，我跟你一起出去。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a, wǒ gēn nǐ yīqǐ chūqù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a, wo3 gen1 ni3 yi1qi3 chu1qu4.",
          "translation_en": "Sure, I'll go out with you.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 같이 나갈게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "媽媽",
          "text": "好，那我們現在出去吧。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, nà wǒmen xiànzài chūqù ba.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, na4 wo3men xian4zai4 chu1qu4 ba.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, let's go out now.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아, 그럼 지금 나가자."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "兒子",
          "text": "等一下，我先拿錢包出來。",
          "pinyin": "Děng yīxià, wǒ xiān ná qiánbāo chūlái.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Deng3 yi1xia4, wo3 xian1 na2 qian2bao1 chu1lai2.",
          "translation_en": "Wait a moment, I'll take out my wallet first.",
          "translation_ko": "잠깐만요, 먼저 지갑을 꺼낼게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "媽媽",
          "text": "好，我在門口等你。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ zài ménkǒu děng nǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, wo3 zai4 men2kou3 deng3 ni3.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll wait for you at the door.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아, 문 앞에서 기다릴게."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the son need to do before going out?",
          "question_ko": "아들은 나가기 전에 무엇을 해야 했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Take out his wallet", "Put on his shoes", "Call a friend", "Eat breakfast"],
          "options_ko": ["지갑을 꺼내다", "신발을 신다", "친구에게 전화하다", "아침을 먹다"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat after the mother: '我要出去買菜，你要一起去嗎？'",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice telling someone you are going out. Say: '我要出去買東西。'"
    },
    {
      "title": "上樓拿東西",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "朋友A",
          "text": "我的手機放在樓上，我要上去拿。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ de shǒujī fàng zài lóushàng, wǒ yào shàngqù ná.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 de shou3ji1 fang4 zai4 lou2shang4, wo3 yao4 shang4qu4 na2.",
          "translation_en": "My phone is upstairs. I need to go up and get it.",
          "translation_ko": "내 핸드폰이 위층에 있어서 올라가서 가져와야 해."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "朋友B",
          "text": "好，我跟你一起上去。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ gēn nǐ yīqǐ shàngqù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, wo3 gen1 ni3 yi1qi3 shang4qu4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll go up with you.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아, 같이 올라갈게."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "朋友A",
          "text": "不用，你可以在這裡等我，我馬上下來。",
          "pinyin": "Búyòng, nǐ kěyǐ zài zhèlǐ děng wǒ, wǒ mǎshàng xiàlái.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu2yong4, ni3 ke3yi3 zai4 zhe4li3 deng3 wo3, wo3 ma3shang4 xia4lai2.",
          "translation_en": "No need, you can wait here for me. I'll come down right away.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아, 여기서 기다려 줘. 금방 내려올게."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "朋友B",
          "text": "好，那你快點上去拿，我在這裡等你。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, nà nǐ kuài diǎn shàngqù ná, wǒ zài zhèlǐ děng nǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, na4 ni3 kuai4 dian3 shang4qu4 na2, wo3 zai4 zhe4li3 deng3 ni3.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, then hurry up and go get it. I'll wait here for you.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아, 그럼 빨리 올라가서 가져와. 여기서 기다릴게."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "朋友A",
          "text": "好，我上去了。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ shàngqù le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, wo3 shang4qu4 le.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'm going up.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아, 올라갈게."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why did friend A need to go upstairs?",
          "question_ko": "친구 A는 왜 위층에 올라가야 했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["To get his phone", "To take a nap", "To eat lunch", "To meet someone"],
          "options_ko": ["핸드폰을 가져오려고", "낮잠을 자려고", "점심을 먹으려고", "누군가를 만나려고"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat after friend A: '我的手機放在樓上，我要上去拿。'",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice saying you need to go upstairs to get something. Say: '我要上去拿東西。'"
    }
  ]
}
